delivery.raw: 主に対面（全開講回数の過半数）、一部オンライン

rows.item: 学習意欲・授業参加度

summary:
This class aims to practice the basic vocabulary and skills necessary for oral communication in English. In form of groupworks and games students will learn keywords and phrases necessary for daily life communication. Students will learn and discuss about English accents and body language in different countries. Students will also learn how cultural aspects affect the communication in foreign languages.
Daily life phrase/keyword practice will be adjusted to student's requirements. Topics for the discussion will be selected based on student's preferences.
The course will be done in Japanese and English.
This class will serve as a preparation class for the Scientific English Communication class (1st semester, 3rd year).
aims: Learning basic English communication - vocabulary, listening and speaking skills
goals: Students get knowledge on basic vocabulary and skills necessary for communication on daily life topics and become able to exchange information on these topics in English.
Students get knowledge on cultural aspects which are important for communication in foreign languages.
Students get knowledge on information searching skills and become able to search and summarize the necessary information.

plan.text:
Guidance, Self-introduction game
Why is English communication important in the modern society? (lecture)

Daily conversation game (speaking practice)
English accents and dialects (lecture and video demonstration)
Discussion about English dialects and their role in international communication.
Homework explanation

Daily conversation game (speaking practice)
Role of body language in communication - explanation and discussion

Body language and gesture game
Gestures in different countries - differences and similarities (lecture)
Discussion about gestures and their role in communication

English accent and dialect - groupwork presentation and discussion
Cultural differences in communication - examples and discussion

World festivals and holidays - differences and similarities (lecture)
Discussion about world festivals
Selection of the discussion topics for the next class
Discussion (group work) on a selected daily life topic, vocabulary and communication skill practice
Discussion (groupwork) on a selected daily life topic, vocabulary and communication skill practice
Discussion (groupwork) on a selected daily life topic, vocabulary and communication skill practice
Discussion (groupwork) on a selected daily life topic, vocabulary and communication skill practice
Debate game - speaking and Q&A practice
Class summary and feedback. Final report guidance. Questionnaire. Explanation of speaking exercises for self-study

prereq: Basic English knowledge, interest for reading, listening and talking in English
prep: English vocabulary study, material collection and summary
